theme.name: Theme
theme.hint: Change the dice theme. WARNING! Foundry VTT will reload after changing this.

chatImage.name: Chat Image
chatImage.hint: Show an image in the chat message after rolling. 'Theme' uses the active dice theme images. 'Custom' uses the images configured below.

soundMode.name: Sound
soundMode.hint: Play a sound after rolling. 'Single' plays one sound for any result. 'Per face' plays a different sound per result.

soundVolume.name: Sound Volume
soundVolume.hint: Volume of the result sound. This setting is per player.

soundSingle.name: Sound File
soundSingle.hint: Audio file played after any roll result. Leave empty to play nothing.

customImage_yesand.name: Custom Image — Yes, and...
customImage_yesand.hint: Show an image in the chat message after rolling. Leave empty to show nothing.

soundFace_yesand.name: Sound — Yes, and...
soundFace_yesand.hint: Audio file played when this result is rolled. Leave empty to play nothing.

customImage_no.name: Custom Image — No
customImage_no.hint: Show an image in the chat message after rolling. Leave empty to show nothing.

soundFace_no.name: Sound — No
soundFace_no.hint: Audio file played when this result is rolled. Leave empty to play nothing.

customImage_nobut.name: Custom Image — No, but
customImage_nobut.hint: Show an image in the chat message after rolling. Leave empty to show nothing.

soundFace_nobut.name: Sound — No, but
soundFace_nobut.hint: Audio file played when this result is rolled. Leave empty to play nothing.

customImage_yesbut.name: Custom Image — Yes, but
customImage_yesbut.hint: Show an image in the chat message after rolling. Leave empty to show nothing.

soundFace_yesbut.name: Sound — Yes, but
soundFace_yesbut.hint: Audio file played when this result is rolled. Leave empty to play nothing.

customImage_yes.name: Custom Image — Yes
customImage_yes.hint: Show an image in the chat message after rolling. Leave empty to show nothing.

soundFace_yes.name: Sound — Yes
soundFace_yes.hint: Audio file played when this result is rolled. Leave empty to play nothing.

customImage_noand.name: Custom Image — No, and...
customImage_noand.hint: Show an image in the chat message after rolling. Leave empty to show nothing.

soundFace_noand.name: Sound — No, and...
soundFace_noand.hint: Audio file played when this result is rolled. Leave empty to play nothing.

keybindings.name: Omniscient Die
keybindings.hint: This shortcut will roll the Omniscient Die.

nobut.title: No, but
nobut.content: This can be a partial no. This can be a no with a twist or complication.

yesbut.title: Yes, but
yesbut.content: This can be a partial yes. This can be a yes with a twist or complication.
